ranking_contract_interpretation.reason: The merged evidence supports an explicit PARK decision, but not an honest full ranking. The report schema requires numeric scores while the repo does not define a numeric scoring formula. This seed therefore uses a fail-closed zero-score sentinel and marks ranking_ready=false.

classification.reject_not_taken_reason: The candidate provides the third league-table entry, achieving the explicit #3164 goal of regime coverage across TREND, RANGE, and HIGH_VOL_CHAOTIC. Strong negative evidence supports the hypothesis that BTCUSDT MEXC 1m offers no profitable edge regardless of regime. Candidate is ring-fenced as PARK/controlled_lab_evidence only, creating no capital or reputational risk.
decision_basis: sample-size PASS was reached in controlled-lab evidence (274 closed trades across 20 windows)
aggregate economics are materially negative: fee_adjusted_return_r=-0.5350, net_pnl=-40443.55
fee drag dominates economics (91.2% of gross loss), similar to range_mean_reversion_v1 pattern
win_rate (5.84%) is the worst across all three PARK candidates
the candidate provides the third league-table entry, completing regime coverage

report_seed_policy.score_note: Zero scores in the seed report are a fail-closed sentinel for a not-ranking-ready candidate, not a comparative quantitative ranking method.

limitations: windows are independent fragments, not one continuous market history
public.candles_1m has no source or venue column; MEXC attribution is inherited from prior same-venue evidence
the league-table report schema requires numeric scores, but the repo does not define a numeric scoring formula
the report seed therefore uses a fail-closed zero-score sentinel with ranking_ready=false
momentum_capture_v1 is long-only first pass only; short-side blocked (HOLD_SHORT_SIDE_BLOCKER)
operational HOLD: parameter set uses ATR p75 (61.82 USD) directional threshold; p90 and p50 variants not tested
operational HOLD: exit parameters (ATR trailing stop multiple, ATR contraction multiple, max hold bars) are initial research estimates
high win_rate suggests directional candles in HVC may be noise rather than signal
